    All Classes and Interfaces

    Classes
    Class
    Description
    Documentation
    Documentation for Skript elements.
    EnumWrapper<E>
    Wrapper class for wrapping Enums to be used in Skript
    JsonDocGenerator
    Generator for JSON documentation for Skript addons.
    Registration
    Registration for registering elements to Skript.
    RegistryClassInfo<T>
    ClassInfo wrapper class for Bukkit Registries
    Utils
    Utility methods used by Registration.
